ddls:
CREATE TABLE "car_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each car model */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the car (e.g., Acura) */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the car model */,
  "model_year" INTEGER /* Year of the car model */,
  "msrp" TEXT /* Manufacturer's Suggested Retail Price */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the car model */,
  "production_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of production */,
  "production_end_date" TEXT /* End date of production */,
  "discontinued" INTEGER /* Indicates if the model is discontinued */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engine_specifications" (
  "spec_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engine specification */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the car model */,
  "engine_size" TEXT /* Size of the engine in liters */,
  "cylinders" INTEGER /* Number of cylinders */,
  "horsepower" INTEGER /* Horsepower of the engine */,
  "torque" INTEGER /* Torque of the engine in lb-ft */,
  "engine_type" TEXT /* Type of engine (e.g., Gasoline, Diesel) */,
  "transmission_type" TEXT /* Type of transmission (e.g., Automatic, Manual) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spec_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engine_specifications_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES car_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fuel_efficiency" (
  "efficiency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fuel efficiency rating */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the car model */,
  "mpg_city" INTEGER /* City fuel efficiency in miles per gallon */,
  "mpg_highway" INTEGER /* Highway fuel efficiency in miles per gallon */,
  "mpg_combined" INTEGER /* Combined fuel efficiency in miles per gallon */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel (e.g., Gasoline, Diesel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("efficiency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fuel_efficiency_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES car_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "physical_dimensions" (
  "dimension_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each physical dimension */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the car model */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length of the car in inches */,
  "width" INTEGER /* Width of the car in inches */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the car in inches */,
  "wheelbase" INTEGER /* Wheelbase of the car in inches */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the car in pounds */,
  "ground_clearance" INTEGER /* Ground clearance of the car in inches */,
  "cargo_capacity" INTEGER /* Cargo capacity of the car in cubic feet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dimension_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_physical_dimensions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES car_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "car_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each car configuration */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the car model */,
  "trim_level" TEXT /* Trim level of the car (e.g., Touring, Elite) */,
  "package" TEXT /* Package name (e.g., Sport Package, Technology Package) */,
  "price" TEXT /* Additional price for the configuration */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the configuration */,
  "production_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of production for the configuration */,
  "production_end_date" TEXT /* End date of production for the configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_car_configurations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES car_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "car_options" (
  "option_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each car option */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the car model */,
  "option_name" TEXT /* Name of the option */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the option */,
  "price" TEXT /* Additional price for the option */,
  "availability" TEXT /* Availability of the option (e.g., Available, Discontinued) */,
  "compatibility" TEXT /* Compatibility of the option with other options */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("option_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_car_options_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES car_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_data" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the car model */,
  "dealer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dealer */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of cars sold */,
  "total_revenue" TEXT /* Total revenue from the sale */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the sale took place */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_dealer_id FOREIGN KEY ("dealer_id") REFERENCES dealers ("dealer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES car_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dealers" (
  "dealer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dealership */,
  "dealer_name" TEXT /* Name of the dealership */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the dealership */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the dealership */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the dealership */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the dealership */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dealer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_data" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer */,
  "loyalty_program" INTEGER /* Indicates if the customer is part of the loyalty program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchases" (
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sale */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the purchase */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Total amount paid for the purchase */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purchase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_sale_id FOREIGN KEY ("sale_id") REFERENCES sales_data ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customer_data ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warranty_claims" (
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warranty claim */,
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the purchase */,
  "claim_date" TEXT /* Date of the warranty claim */,
  "issue_description" TEXT /* Description of the issue */,
  "claim_status" TEXT /* Status of the claim (e.g., Open, Closed) */,
  "claim_amount" TEXT /* Amount claimed for the warranty */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date of resolution for the claim */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("claim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_warranty_claims_purchase_id FOREIGN KEY ("purchase_id") REFERENCES purchases ("purchase_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_records" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the car model */,
  "service_date" TEXT /* Date of the service */,
  "service_description" TEXT /* Description of the service */,
  "service_cost" TEXT /* Cost of the service */,
  "dealer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dealer */,
  "technician" TEXT /* Technician who performed the service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_records_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES car_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_records_dealer_id FOREIGN KEY ("dealer_id") REFERENCES dealers ("dealer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Admin, Sales Rep) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions assigned to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for login */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., Login, View, Edit) */,
  "accessed_resource" TEXT /* Resource accessed (e.g., Car Model, Sales Data) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_variations" (
  "variation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model variation */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the car model */,
  "variation_name" TEXT /* Name of the variation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the variation */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the variation */,
  "production_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of production for the variation */,
  "production_end_date" TEXT /* End date of production for the variation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_variations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES car_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_research" (
  "research_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market research entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the car model */,
  "research_date" TEXT /* Date of the research */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the research (e.g., Survey, Report) */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the research findings */,
  "report_file" TEXT /* File path to the research report */,
  "research_type" TEXT /* Type of research (e.g., Customer Survey, Market Analysis) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("research_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_research_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES car_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer feedback */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the car model */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date of the feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the customer */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., Positive, Negative, Suggestion) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES car_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customer_data ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incentives" (
  "incentive_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incentive */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the car model */,
  "incentive_name" TEXT /* Name of the incentive */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the incentive */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the incentive */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the incentive */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the incentive */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incentive_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incentives_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES car_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "depreciation" (
  "depreciation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each depreciation entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the car model */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the depreciation */,
  "depreciation_amount" TEXT /* Depreciation amount for the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("depreciation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_depreciation_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES car_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recall_notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recall notification */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the car model */,
  "recall_date" TEXT /* Date of the recall */,
  "recall_description" TEXT /* Description of the recall */,
  "recall_status" TEXT /* Status of the recall (e.g., Open, Closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recall_notifications_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES car_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "software_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each software update */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the car model */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of the update */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  "update_version" TEXT /* Version of the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_software_updates_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES car_models ("model_id")
)
